description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe featuring a broad, symmetrical black blade with two large, crescent-shaped cutting edges. The blade is mounted on a straight, cylindrical wooden handle that displays a natural wood grain pattern, suggesting it is made from a sturdy hardwood. The blade is wide and flat, with a central cutout and pointed tips on each end, giving it a menacing and decorative appearance. The handle appears smooth and slightly tapered, with no visible grip enhancements or wrappings. The axe is visually striking, with a stark contrast between the dark blade and the lighter wooden handle. There are no visible markings, engravings, or brand labels on either the blade or the handle.
description: A double-headed black battle axe with a wide, crescent-shaped blade and a straight wooden handle. The design is bold and decorative, with a strong contrast between the dark blade and natural wood.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the double-edged black blade and the straight wooden handle centered below.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the symmetrical blade and handle, with the blade's cutout visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the blade's thinness and the handle's length.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with visible grain, no curvature or grip features, round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical, wide black blade with two crescent-shaped edges and a central cutout, no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting, blade fitted onto the handle.
